<!-- d20pfsrd:rewritten -->
# Oceanrider

Contents

- Armor Proficiency
- Aquatic Mount

Oceanriders are underwater cavaliers who ride dolphins, orcas, or seahorses.

#### Armor Proficiency

An oceanrider is proficient with light and medium armor, and with shields (but not tower shields).

This alters armor proficiency.

#### Aquatic Mount

A Medium oceanrider can ride either a seahorse or an orca (unlike most orcas, this one starts at size Large with none of the other level 7 abilities until level 7) instead of the
